title: cirsium suffultum
intro: Cirsium suffultum, also known as the Suffrutescent Thistle, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and sesquiterpene lactones. The Suffrutescent Thistle is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and acting as an antispasmodic. Cirsium suffultum is commonly used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
